Meaningful organic posts reveal a genuine strategic narrative — KEEL's transition from Bitcoin mining to AI/HPC infrastructure via the Sherbrooke Quebec campus is a credible catalyst, but near-term price action has been punishing (-5.97% on the day cited) alongside peers, and technical indicators (Ichimoku weekly) are described as poor, offsetting the bullish institutional accumulation and infrastructure development storyline.

results.topBearish: At $125 a share, using IPO price only for day 1 buys and closing prices for rest, Cathie Wood would be down $51.75 million on her $SPCX holdings between $ARKK, $ARKQ, $ARKW, and $ARKX. Doesn't include any further losses from anything she may have bought today. @TeslaBoomerMama
